title: Kanonkop youths do their 67 minutes in their own community
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Youths from Kanonkop in Knysna...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Youths from Kanonkop in Knysna heeded the call to engage in community service as part of their 67 minutes on Mandela Day, Friday 18 July.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Youths from Kanonkop in Knysna heeded the call to engage in community service as part of their 67 minutes on Mandela Day, Friday 18 July."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The youngsters visited the Dorothy Broster Child and Youth Care Centre and a community church to lend a helping hand and promote the spirit of ubuntu."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Their efforts not only made a visible difference in the community but also inspired others to participate in future initiatives.","html":"Their efforts not only made a visible difference in the community but also inspired others to participate in future initiatives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The youngsters renovated the Hall of the Reborn Ambassadors Church in Kanonkop and cleaned various areas in the Kanonkop community.","html":"The youngsters renovated the Hall of the Reborn Ambassadors Church in Kanonkop and cleaned various areas in the Kanonkop community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tessa Bezuidenhout, member of the Kanonkop Community Structure, spearheaded the initiative and thanked the chairperson of the infrastructure services committee, Cllr Beauty Charlie, whose assistance made the project possible.","html":"Tessa Bezuidenhout, member of the Kanonkop Community Structure, spearheaded the initiative and thanked the chairperson of the infrastructure services committee, Cllr Beauty Charlie, whose assistance made the project possible."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She also thanked sponsors who donated towards the initiative out of their own pockets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bezuidenhout praised the youth of Kanonkop and their parents for allowing them to take part in the Nelson Mandela Day initiative.","html":"Bezuidenhout praised the youth of Kanonkop and their parents for allowing them to take part in the Nelson Mandela Day initiative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Kanonkop youths do their 67 minutes in their own community
